overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay footage exploring a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at dusk. The player walks through neon-lit streets with wet reflective surfaces, passing futuristic vehicles, holographic advertisements, and pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements. The environment features dense urban architecture with towering glass skyscrapers and vibrant neon signage typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and neon signage

events.description: black sports car speeds past from left to right through the intersection
police cruiser follows through the intersection with sirens
begins walking forward across the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk observing traffic, then walking across the wet street while avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sports car speeding through the intersection from left to right
police cruiser following the sports car with emergency lights

entered.detail: tall commercial building with prominent red neon 'All Foods' signage
large vertical holographic advertisement tower with changing pink and blue colors
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet reflective asphalt
tall glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a busy cyberpunk intersection with the 'All Foods' building visible on the left. A black sports car and police cruiser speed past as the player stands at the crosswalk. The player then begins walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk, with wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant neon lights from surrounding holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with parked vehicles and storefront awnings

events.description: moves from open intersection onto the covered sidewalk alongside buildings
passing a pedestrian with a glowing yellow umbrella walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red concrete sidewalk, passing parked cars and observing street details

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing yellow umbrella and colorful leggings walking toward the camera

entered.detail: parked teal-colored retro-futuristic sedan with glowing undercarriage accents
building with dark red walls and horizontal orange neon strip lighting
tall palm trees lining the street median between road and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open intersection onto a covered sidewalk lined with a red building facade on the right. A distinctive teal vintage car is parked along the curb. The player passes a pedestrian carrying a glowing yellow umbrella, while palm trees line the street median to the left. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic signals and construction barriers

events.description: approaching the Longshore S intersection with overhead traffic gantry
crossing the street at the intersection while traffic lights show green

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection and crossing the street alongside other pedestrians, heading toward the distant pagoda tower

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue glowing umbrella crossing the street ahead of the player

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal structure spanning the road with green lights illuminated
red street sign reading 'Longshore S' mounted on the traffic gantry
red and white striped concrete barriers with debris and trash bags nearby
distinctive Asian-inspired tower with tiered roofs visible in the distant skyline

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the Longshore S intersection, marked by an overhead traffic gantry with green signals. Construction barriers and debris line the right side of the sidewalk. The player crosses the street alongside a pedestrian with a blue glowing umbrella, heading toward a distinctive pagoda tower visible in the distance. The scene opens into a wider plaza area with tall glass skyscrapers surrounding the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon intersection through a sheltered urban corridor and into a wide, skyscraper-lined plaza. It begins at a busy crosswalk by the All Foods building, where a black sports car and police cruiser speed past as the camera moves across wet asphalt reflecting vibrant holographic billboards. As the player leaves the open intersection, the scene shifts onto a covered sidewalk beside a red building facade, passing a parked teal vintage car and a pedestrian with a glowing yellow umbrella. The movement then carries the camera toward the Longshore S intersection under a green traffic gantry, weaving past construction barriers and a pedestrian with a blue glowing umbrella. Finally, the view opens up into a vast plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers, with the camera heading toward a distant pagoda tower.
